C. Loop Repeating (Loop Shorter Overlay Document)
Loop-repeats the overlay document if it is shorter than the base document. If unchecked, remaining pages are left blank.

Find answers to common questions about {brand}
No FAQs found matching your search.
Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.
Do I need to create an account?
No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.
Are my files uploaded to a server?
No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?
Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.
What happens to my files after processing?

Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.
What PDF operations can I perform?
PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.
Can I merge multiple PDF files?
Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.
Can I convert images to PDF?
Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.
Can I edit text in a PDF?

PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.
PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
Is there a file size limit?
Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.
Why is processing slow for large files?

Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.
Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.
PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).
How do I change the language?
You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.
Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

{brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.

Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
{brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
<strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
